summary: Comprehensive testing of Locofast v2.0 features: Split bulk logistics, Bangladesh BIN field, and Agent-assisted booking system. 20/21 backend tests passed (1 minor health endpoint 404). All frontend flows verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: Agent OTP login page loads at /agent/login
Agent send-otp requires active agent account (403 for non-existent)
Agent send-otp works for existing agent (agent@locofast.com)
Agent verify-otp rejects invalid OTP (400)
Agent shared-cart creation requires authentication (401)
Public shared cart accessible via GET /api/agent/cart/{token}
Invalid cart token returns 404
Admin can list agents via GET /api/agent/admin/list
Admin can create agents via POST /api/agent/admin/create
Admin create duplicate agent fails (400)
Admin can update agent status via PUT /api/agent/admin/{id}
Agent stats endpoint returns performance data
RFQ lead with Bangladesh BIN number stores correctly
RFQ lead with India GST number stores correctly
RFQ lead validation requires name, email, phone
Logistics split calculation verified (Packaging + Logistics)
Sample order flat logistics verified (Rs 100)
Orders list returns booking_type field
Invoice endpoint exists and returns PDF
Fabrics endpoint working
Checkout page shows Packaging and Logistics separately for bulk orders
Checkout page shows single Logistics (Flat) line for sample orders
RFQ Modal shows BIN field when Bangladesh is selected
RFQ Modal hides BIN field for India (shows GST instead)
Agent login page loads with email input and Send OTP button
Agent OTP verification step appears after sending OTP
Admin Agents page loads with Create Agent button
Admin Agents modal opens for creating new agents
Admin Orders page shows Orders and Credit Management tabs
Admin Orders shows 'Online' booking type labels
Shared Cart page loads with agent info banner
Shared Cart shows Sign In & Checkout button for unauthenticated users
critical_code_review_comments: Split logistics calculation correctly implemented: Total = max(3% subtotal, Rs 3000), Packaging = qty * 1, Logistics = Total - Packaging
Sample orders correctly use flat Rs 100 logistics with no split
Bangladesh BIN field correctly shows/hides based on location selection
Agent OTP system properly validates active agent status before sending OTP
Shared cart token system working with 7-day expiry
Admin agent management includes stats endpoint with conversion rate calculation
seed_data_creation: Test agents created during testing (test_agent_* emails)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All v2.0 features tested and working. Key endpoints: /api/agent/send-otp, /api/agent/verify-otp, /api/agent/shared-cart, /api/agent/admin/list, /api/agent/admin/create, /api/agent/admin/{id}, /api/agent/admin/{id}/stats, /api/enquiries/rfq-lead (stores bin_number). Checkout correctly splits logistics for bulk orders (Packaging + Logistics) and shows flat Rs 100 for samples. Shared cart token 272f3411ca41 exists with test item.

split_bulk_logistics.details: Checkout shows Packaging (Rs 1/m) and Logistics separately for bulk orders. Sample orders show Logistics (Flat) Rs 100.

bangladesh_bin_field.details: RFQ Modal shows BIN field for Bangladesh, GST field for India. Backend stores bin_number in enquiries.

agent_assisted_booking.details: Agent login via OTP, shared cart creation, public cart access, admin agent management all working.

admin_orders_booking_type.details: Orders show 'Online' or 'Assisted Online' labels with agent name.

invoice_pdf_split_logistics.details: Invoice generation endpoint exists. Code shows Packaging and Logistics separately for bulk orders.
